text: polos asir hamashicha yeshu'a vetimotios haach el-fileymon hechaviv veha'ozer otanu
veel-apiya haahuva veel-arekhipos hechaver lanu bemilechamoteynu veel-haqehila asher beveytekha
chesed lakhem veshalom meet elohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
mode ani lelohay bekhal-'et behazekiri otekha bitefilotay
acharey shame'i ahavatekha veemunatekha asher-bekha laadoneynu yeshu'a ulekhal-haqedoshim
lema'an asher titechazeq hitechaberut emunatekha beda'at kal-tov asher bakhem leshem hamashicha yeshu'a
ki simecha gedola venechama yesh-lanu beahavatekha baasher hayeta revacha lime'ey haqedoshim 'al-yadekha achi
lakhen af-ki yesh-li omets rav bamashicha letsaotekha et hanakhon hine vachareti lema'an haahava lechalot et-paneykha
anokhi polos hazaqen ve'ata gam-asir yeshu'a hamashicha
hineni mechale et-paneykha 'al-beni asher cholaletiv biheyoty bamaasar 'al-onisimos
asher milefanim lo-ho'il lakh ve'ata hu leho'il gam-lekha gam-li vahashivotiv eleykha
veata qabel-na oto shehu yaqar lelibi
chafatseti la'atsor oto etseli sheyesharateni tacheteykha bemoserot habesora
aval lo chafatseti la'asot davar shel viretsonekha kedey shel-tiheye tovatekha beones ki im-binedava
ki ulay niferad mimekha lesha'a ba'avur asher yiheyeh-lekha le'olam
ume'ata lo khe'eved ki im-lema'ela me'eved keach ahuv beyoter li veaf ki-lekha hen babasar hen baadon
vehine im-tachesheveni lechaver lakh teqabelenu kamoni
veim-hera' lekha bedavar o chayav-hu lekha davar chashevehu li
ani polos kataveti veyadi ani ashalem velo omar ki-ata chayav li gam-et-nafeshekha
ken achi ehaneh-na mimekha baadon nachem-na et-libi baadon
kataveti eleykha vaani vatucha bekha shetishema' li veyode'a ani shetosif la'asot 'al-asher amareti
vegam-li takhin beyt malon ki aqave asher enaten lakhem 'al-yedey tefiloteykhem
epaferas haasur iti bamashicha yeshu'a
umareqos vaarisetarekhos vedimas veluqas 'ozeray shoalim lishelomekha
chesed yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu 'im-ruchakhem amen ﻿
